data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Warranty tracking on parts and labor', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, the prior steps do not provide any concrete evidence or API reads that confirm the existence or functionality of warranty tracking for parts and labor. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as there is no evidence to support that this critical feature is implemented or functioning as required.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of warranty tracking on parts and labor.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
